title: heliotropium bacciferum subsp. antiatlanticum
intro: Heliotropium bacciferum subsp. antiatlanticum, also known as the antiatlantic heliotrope, is a subspecies of the Heliotropium bacciferum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Heliotropium bacciferum subsp. antiatlanticum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, and can also be found in herbal supplements or tinctures.
